▶ Analysis Framework — Sales Overview
Soalan untuk dijawab
Website RM 4.09M — berapa % datang dari agent vs retail? Kalau agent drop, revenue drop drastically.
TikTok 23,149 orders vs Shopee 4,531 — kenapa gap besar? Advert spend ratio sama ke tidak?
AOV TikTok (RM 162) paling rendah. Boleh ke naik ke RM175+?
TikTok cancel rate 14.2% — adakah ini trending naik atau stable berbanding bulan lepas?
Actions & Decisions
Set monthly revenue target per platform untuk benchmark bulan depan.
TikTok: focus upsell strategy untuk naikkan AOV dari RM 162 ke RM175+.
Build weekly tracking yang proper — nampak pattern W1 ke W4.
Website agent dependency tinggi — kena ada contingency kalau top agents churn.
02
Product Performance
Revenue dan units by product across all platforms
ProdukTT UnitsSH UnitsWB UnitsTotal UnitsRevenue
Mindtropic 14,978 2,487 16,288 33,753

RM 715,670

RM 610,597

RM 144,660

RM 133,720

RM 108,345
Afeeya Cafe Zero 190 105 1,546 1,841
RM 70,565
Redianze 92 13 83 188
RM 38,105

RM 31,235

▶ Analysis Framework — Product Performance
Soalan untuk dijawab
Mindtropic vs Mindtropic Junior — ratio seimbang ke atau satu patut dominate?
Diffenz contribution berapa % dari total? Apa yang block dia?
Phytax — platform mana yang paling strong? Ada gap platform yang sengaja atau terlepas pandang?
Actions & Decisions
Rank produk ikut margin, bukan sekadar revenue — mana yang paling untung per unit.
Products yang zero di sesebuah platform — ada gap atau sengaja?
Diffenz perlu dedicated campaign — revenue potential ada tapi masih tertinggal.

▶ Analysis Framework — Location
Soalan untuk dijawab
Selangor dominates — normal ikut population ke ada negeri yang underperform relative to size?
Sabah & Sarawak ada traction — boleh expand lagi ke?
Mana negeri yang ada population besar tapi sales rendah = untapped market?
Actions & Decisions
Overlay dengan population data untuk dapat revenue per capita by state.
Identify top 3 negeri yang underperform untuk geo-targeting campaign.
Kelantan — population besar, signal ada untapped demand.
04
Cancellations
Cancel rate dan sebab pembatalan by platform
TikTok ⚠ 14.2% cancel rate — 3,826 orders
SebabCount%
No longer needed1,27033.2%
Customer overdue to pay1,15630.2%
Need to change payment method3549.3%
Better price available3358.8%
Package delivery failed2205.8%
Payment method not available1443.8%
Shopee 9.6% cancel rate — 482 orders

Shopee cancel rate 9.6% — lebih rendah dari TikTok. Mostly buyer-initiated cancellations.

▶ Analysis Framework — Cancellations
Soalan untuk dijawab
TikTok 14.2% cancel — above acceptable threshold. Trend naik atau stabil?
"No longer needed" — berapa lama selepas order baru cancel? Dalam 1 jam atau 24 jam?
"Better price available" — competitor pricing ke, atau orang jumpa voucher lain selepas checkout?
Actions & Decisions
Track cancel rate weekly supaya boleh detect spike awal.
TikTok: reduce COD exposure atau improve pre-checkout flow untuk serious buyers.
Cancel rate 14.2% bermaksud ~RMRM 620,219 potential revenue lost monthly.

RM 755,708

Shopee — Top Variations
VariationProdukUnitsRevenue
ComboEskayvie Mindtropic 842RM 160,414
ComboEskayvie Mindtropic 745RM 140,939
SingleEskayvie Mindtropic 707RM 76,637
Set 4 MindtropicEskayvie Mindtropic 152RM 56,669
SingleEskayvie Mindtropic 488RM 54,689
Combo Family Mind BEskayvie Mindtropic 274RM 50,931
Set 4 Family Mind BEskayvie Mindtropic 115RM 43,780
Kids Perfect ComboEskayvie Mindtropic 250RM 41,783
▶ Analysis Framework — SKU / Variation
Soalan untuk dijawab
Combo 2-box consistently top seller — boleh push lebih aggressively ke Combo 4-box?
Ada SKU dalam catalog yang zero sales dalam Jun — perlu discontinue atau maintain?
Actions & Decisions
Upsell strategy: buyer yang beli Single → retarget dengan Combo offer dalam 7 hari.
4-box sets ada market — push lebih aggressively di TikTok.
06
Payment Method
How customers pay across platforms
TikTok
KaedahBreakdown
Cash on delivery
8,873 (38.3%)
Internet Banking
7,210 (31.1%)
PayLater
3,164 (13.7%)
Credit/debit card
1,465 (6.3%)
DuitNow QR
831 (3.6%)
Touch'n Go
649 (2.8%)
Atome
368 (1.6%)
Apple Pay
176 (0.8%)
Website

Majority payments via agent offline channels. RazorPay untuk online transactions. ~2.5% processing fee.

▶ Analysis Framework — Payment Method
Soalan untuk dijawab
TikTok COD — berapa percent yang actually failed delivery atau dikembalikan?
PayLater — indicator buyer ada cash flow constraint. Ada implication untuk pricing strategy?
Actions & Decisions
Track COD failed delivery rate secara berasingan — ini direct cash exposure.
Consider limit COD untuk produk high-value atau states dengan high return rate.
07
Delivery Method
Fulfilment channels and courier mix
TikTok Courier Mix
CourierOrders
J&T Express22,796
Grab-MY48
ABX Express-MY 16
Shopee Delivery
MethodOrders
Doorstep Delivery-SPX Express (West Malaysia)3,636
Instant Delivery (Arrange in 90 mins)442
Doorstep Delivery-SPX Express (East Malaysia)338
Self Collection Point (SPX Express)99
Doorstep Delivery (Brunei)-Brunei Direct Shipment (SPX)6
Doorstep Delivery-GDEX4
Doorstep Delivery (Sea Shipping)-SPX Express (Sea Shipping)3
Self Collection Locker (SPX Express)2
▶ Analysis Framework — Delivery
Soalan untuk dijawab
TikTok J&T dominance — ada SLA breach cases? Average days to deliver berapa?
East Malaysia delivery — courier coverage adequate? Ada complaint dari buyers?
Actions & Decisions
Get J&T SLA report untuk cross-check delivery performance.
COD failed delivery cost kena masuk dalam monthly P&L — ini cash at risk.
08
Order Timing
Daily revenue trend dan hourly order pattern
TikTok Hourly Order Pattern
Daily Revenue Trend
▶ Analysis Framework — Order Timing
Soalan untuk dijawab
Peak order hours — ini organic ke ada scheduled live/campaign masa tu?
Jun 26-28 spike — ada event yang trigger? Campaign apa yang run masa tu?
Actions & Decisions
Schedule live sessions pada prime hours — data dah prove bila waktu terbaik.
Correlate daily spikes dengan campaign log untuk prove ROI.
09
Average Order Value
AOV distribution by platform
TikTok AOV
RM 162
Orders
23,149
Shopee AOV
RM 200
Orders
4,531
Website AOV
RM 194
Orders
21,128
TikTok — AOV Distribution
▶ Analysis Framework — AOV
Soalan untuk dijawab
TikTok AOV RM 162 — kalau naik RM20, berapa tambahan revenue dengan volume sama?
Shopee AOV lebih tinggi — kenapa? Lebih ramai beli multiple items dalam satu order?
Actions & Decisions
TikTok: introduce bundle upsell at checkout — nudge AOV naik.
Set AOV improvement target per platform setiap bulan — track religiously.
10
Member Type
Website revenue breakdown by member category
Member TypeOrdersRevenue & Share
Agent 36,306
RM 6.92M (79.3%)
EPC 10,115
RM 1.72M (19.8%)
Unconfirmed 1,197
RM 39,575 (0.5%)
Inactive EPC 538
RM 36,343 (0.4%)
EPC Plus 29
RM 7,407 (0.1%)
▶ Analysis Framework — Member Type
Soalan untuk dijawab
Agent dependency — kalau top 10 agents berhenti, berapa percent revenue at risk?
EPC — growing atau shrinking trend berbanding bulan lepas?
Unconfirmed buyers — boleh convert ke EPC dengan follow-up campaign?
Actions & Decisions
Identify top 20 agents by revenue — ada dedicated retention program?
Build EPC acquisition funnel yang lebih aggressive.
Agent dependency adalah business risk — diversify dengan push direct retail.
11
Discount & Voucher
What we pay vs what platforms sponsor
TikTok
Seller discount—
Platform sponsored—
Shopee
Seller discountRM 1,006
Platform rebate—
Website
Total discount givenRM 86,260
✓ Paling efficient — discount rate rendah
▶ Analysis Framework — Discount & Voucher
Soalan untuk dijawab
TikTok seller discount — ROI dia berapa? Revenue yang generated worth it?
Shopee platform rebate — apa syarat maintain atau increase allocation ni?
Actions & Decisions
Audit voucher codes — mana yang drive real incremental sales.
Set discount budget per platform dengan expected revenue multiplier minimum 5x.
TikTok seller discount kena ada clear ROI threshold sebelum approve budget.
12
Net Revenue
Gross revenue vs platform fees vs net to seller
TikTok
GrossRM 3.75M
Est. Fees (~2.5%)-RM 93,688
Net to SellerRM 3.65M
Shopee
GrossRM 907,923
Est. Fees (~26.7%)-RM 242,416
Net to SellerRM 665,508
⚠ Highest fee rate
Website
GrossRM 4.09M
Est. Fees (~2.5%)-RM 102,251
Net to SellerRM 3.99M
✓ Most efficient channel
▶ Analysis Framework — Net Revenue
Soalan untuk dijawab
Shopee fee rate tinggi — acceptable untuk category health products? Competitor benchmark berapa?
Website net paling tinggi dengan fee rendah — kenapa masih push Shopee kalau margin jauh lebih rendah?
Actions & Decisions
Build proper P&L per platform termasuk ads cost, discount, dan fees.
Set net margin target per platform, bukan sekadar gross revenue.
Shopee mungkin worth it untuk brand visibility — tapi kena measure dengan betul.
